# catalystcenter_power_profile (Resource)

This resource manages AP Power Profiles. Power Profiles configure interface-level power rules (Ethernet speed, radio spatial streams, USB state) to control AP power consumption.

## Example Usage

```terraform
resource "catalystcenter_power_profile" "example" {
  profile_name = "Low_Power_Profile"
  description  = "Reduce power consumption on APs"
  rules = [
    {
      interface_type  = "RADIO"
      interface_id    = "6GHZ"
      parameter_type  = "STATE"
      parameter_value = "DISABLE"
    }
  ]
}
```

<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Required

- `profile_name` (String) Name of the Power Profile
- `rules` (Attributes List) Ordered list of rules for the Power Profile (see [below for nested schema](#nestedatt--rules))

### Optional

- `description` (String) Description of the Power Profile

### Read-Only

- `id` (String) The id of the object

<a id="nestedatt--rules"></a>
### Nested Schema for `rules`

Required:

- `interface_id` (String) Interface ID for the rule
  - Choices: `GIGABITETHERNET0`, `GIGABITETHERNET1`, `LAN1`, `LAN2`, `LAN3`, `6GHZ`, `5GHZ`, `SECONDARY_5GHZ`, `2_4GHZ`, `USB0`
- `interface_type` (String) Interface Type for the rule
  - Choices: `ETHERNET`, `RADIO`, `USB`
- `parameter_type` (String) Parameter Type for the rule
  - Choices: `SPEED`, `SPATIALSTREAM`, `STATE`
- `parameter_value` (String) Parameter Value for the rule
  - Choices: `5000MBPS`, `2500MBPS`, `1000MBPS`, `100MBPS`, `EIGHT_BY_EIGHT`, `FOUR_BY_FOUR`, `THREE_BY_THREE`, `TWO_BY_TWO`, `ONE_BY_ONE`, `DISABLE`

## Import

Import is supported using the following syntax:

The [`terraform import` command](https://developer.hashicorp.com/terraform/cli/commands/import) can be used, for example:

```shell
terraform import catalystcenter_power_profile.example "<profile_name>"
```
